name: ib-t010-e1-llamacpp
description: IB-T010 E1 llama.cpp sub-experiment: short prompts/short directed completions, low offered rate (single-slot llama-server, mean inter-arrival >> mean service time) so queueing delay stays negligible and the direct-vs-gateway TTFT delta approximates non-queue overhead against a REAL engine (CPU reality: modest request counts).
